properties.Name: Spencer's Restaurant
properties.Address: 701 W Baristo Rd, Palm Springs, CA 92262
properties.Description: Four-star American cuisine with French-Pacific Rim influence. Elegant patio dining at the Parker hotel.

properties.Name: Jake's
properties.Address: 664 N Palm Canyon Dr, Palm Springs, CA 92262
properties.Description: Hip, casual American bistro with a lively patio scene on Palm Canyon Drive.

properties.Name: Tac/Quila
properties.Address: 150 S Indian Canyon Dr, Palm Springs, CA 92262
properties.Description: Michelin-recognized Mexican eatery serving street fare, seafood, meat dishes and craft cocktails.

properties.Name: The Tropicale Palm Springs
properties.Address: 330 E Amado Rd, Palm Springs, CA 92262
properties.Description: Inspired by upbeat 1960s-style supper clubs. International cuisine with retro Palm Springs vibes.

properties.Name: Workshop Kitchen & Bar
properties.Address: 800 N Palm Canyon Dr, Palm Springs, CA 92262
properties.Description: Michelin and James Beard recognized. Inventive New American eats and seasonal craft cocktails in a former movie house.

properties.Name: Eight4Nine Restaurant & Lounge
properties.Address: 849 N Palm Canyon Dr, Palm Springs, CA 92262
properties.Description: Contemporary eatery offering refined New American cuisine in a stunning modern space.

properties.Name: Johnny Costa's Ristorante
properties.Address: 440 S Palm Canyon Dr, Palm Springs, CA 92264
properties.Description: Classic Italian restaurant. A Palm Springs institution for traditional pasta and veal dishes.

properties.Name: The Heyday
properties.Address: 1555 N Palm Canyon Dr, Palm Springs, CA 92262
properties.Description: Casual spot known for solid burgers and a laid-back Uptown atmosphere.

properties.Name: Bar Cecil
properties.Address: 1775 E Palm Canyon Dr, Palm Springs, CA 92264
properties.Description: American and French fare in a stylish setting. Great cocktails and weekend brunch.

properties.Name: Clandestino
properties.Address: 225 S Palm Canyon Dr, Palm Springs, CA 92262
properties.Description: Modern Mexican with creative cocktails and a sleek downtown atmosphere.

properties.Name: Farm
properties.Address: 6 La Plaza, Palm Springs, CA 92262
properties.Description: Intimate, country-chic eatery with farm-to-table Provençal fare, including a beloved breakfast menu.

properties.Name: Tyler's Burgers
properties.Address: 149 S Indian Canyon Dr, Palm Springs, CA 92262
properties.Description: Palm Springs institution since 1996. Old-school walk-up burger stand. Cash-simple menu: burgers, turkey burgers, patty melts, fries. 836+ Yelp reviews.

properties.Name: John's Restaurant
properties.Address: 900 N Palm Canyon Dr, Palm Springs, CA 92262
properties.Description: The 'Heartstopper' burger (bacon, sausage, cheese, fried egg on 1/3-lb patty). Classic American diner with charbroiler. Big portions, local favorite.

properties.Name: Smokin' Burgers & Lounge
properties.Address: 1775 E Palm Canyon Dr, Suite 220, Palm Springs, CA 92264
properties.Description: The 'Big Wow Burger' — 1 pound, two patties, bacon, avocado, provolone. Won 'Best Burger' in Palm Springs multiple years. Open until midnight.

properties.Name: Bongo Johnny's Patio Bar & Grill
properties.Address: 301 N Palm Canyon Dr, Suite 200, Palm Springs, CA 92262
properties.Description: 'Big Kahuna Burger' (two half-pound patties, double bacon). Gold Canyon Premium Angus Chuck. Famous $7 bottomless champagne brunch.

properties.Name: 1501 Uptown Gastropub
properties.Address: 1501 N Palm Canyon Dr, Palm Springs, CA 92262
properties.Description: '1501 Burger' — 1/2 lb beef, cave-aged cheddar, smoked bacon, brioche bun. Modern gastropub with craft cocktails and mountain-view patio.

properties.Name: Blackbook
properties.Address: 315 E Arenas Rd, Palm Springs, CA 92262
properties.Description: Voted Best Restaurant in Palm Springs. Angus burger with applewood bacon and hickory sauce. Cocktail bar vibes plus Nashville hot chicken.

properties.Name: Zin American Bistro
properties.Address: 198 S Palm Canyon Dr, Palm Springs, CA 92262
properties.Description: Wagyu burger with caramelized onions and white cheddar. Truffle fries. 21 consecutive Wine Spectator Awards. Upscale bistro.

properties.Name: Tony's Grill & Bar
properties.Address: 665 S Palm Canyon Dr, Palm Springs, CA 92264
properties.Description: 'Fantasy Burger' (bacon, mushrooms, blue cheese, chipotle mayo). 10+ flavors of fries. Wide burger selection.

properties.Name: The Sandwich Spot
properties.Address: 276 N Palm Canyon Dr, Palm Springs, CA 92262
properties.Description: 20+ creative sandwiches on Dutch Crunch or Marble Rye. Ranked #3 of 280 Palm Springs restaurants on TripAdvisor. Fast, perfect for conference lunch.

properties.Name: Sherman's Deli & Bakery
properties.Address: 401 E Tahquitz Canyon Way, Palm Springs, CA 92262
properties.Description: Classic NYC-style deli. Massive corned beef, pastrami, Reubens. Famous pastries and cakes. Basically next door to the convention center.

properties.Name: Maracas Cantina
properties.Address: 155 S Palm Canyon Dr, Palm Springs, CA 92262
properties.Description: Festive Mexican classics, strong margaritas, lively patio. Good group spot in the heart of downtown.

properties.Name: Lulu California Bistro
properties.Address: 200 S Palm Canyon Dr, Palm Springs, CA 92262
properties.Description: Award-winning California bistro. The 'hippest restaurant in Palm Springs.' 5,600+ Yelp reviews. Great streetside patio and weekend brunch.

properties.Name: Rooster and the Pig
properties.Address: 356 S Indian Canyon Dr, Palm Springs, CA 92262
properties.Description: Modern Vietnamese. No reservations — lines form at open. Legendary crunchy rolls. One of the most acclaimed restaurants in Palm Springs.

properties.Name: Ruben and Ozzy's Oyster Bar & Grill
properties.Address: 241 E Tahquitz Canyon Way, Palm Springs, CA 92262
properties.Description: Fresh oysters, seafood, great cocktails. Very close to the convention center. Great happy hour spot.

properties.Name: Las Casuelas Terraza
properties.Address: 222 S Palm Canyon Dr, Palm Springs, CA 92262
properties.Description: Historic Palm Springs Mexican restaurant. Large patio, strong margaritas, tableside guacamole. Accommodates large groups.

properties.Name: Sammy G's Tuscan Grill
properties.Address: 265 S Palm Canyon Dr, Palm Springs, CA 92262
properties.Description: Italian comfort food with a semi-private room for groups. Good happy hour. Solid choice for group conference dinners.

properties.Name: Palm Springs Convention Center
properties.Address: 277 N Avenida Caballeros, Palm Springs, CA 92262
properties.Description: Esri Developer Summit 2026 venue. March 10-13.

properties.Name: Hotel Zoso
properties.Address: 150 S Indian Canyon Dr, Palm Springs, CA 92262
properties.Description: Conference hotel. Walking distance to convention center and downtown restaurants.
